title: directory .metadata/summary.yaml
description: Index file for a directory listed in .gates/config.yaml. Must be updated whenever any file in that directory is modified.

id.description: Stable identifier for this indexed directory.

covers.description: Files inside this directory that this summary describes. Use paths relative to the directory.

last_updated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last meaningful update.

status.description: stub = auto-created, must be filled before commit. filled = ready.
